expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

tables.name: @Dataset Metadata
partitionExpressions:
let
 Refresh = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.FromList(List.DateTimes(DateTime.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), 1, #duration(0, 0, 0, 0)), Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Last Data Refresh (UTC)"}, null, ExtraValues.Error), {{"Last Data Refresh (UTC)", type datetime}}),
#"Added Environment" = Table.AddColumn(Refresh, "Environment", each _Environment),
#"Added BuildNumber" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Environment", "Build Number", each _BuildNumber)

 in
#"Added BuildNumber"

tables.name: @Measures
partitionExpressions:
let
 Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("i44FAA==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [Column1 = _t])

 in
Source

measures.name: Count of Customer Accounts Opted In (As Today)
measures.expression:
VAR LatestDate = 
    CALCULATE(
        MAX('Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk]), 
        ALLSELECTED('Customer Loyalty')  
    )

RETURN 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk]),
    'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Status Sk] = "OptedIn",
    'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] = LatestDate, 
    REMOVEFILTERS('Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk]) 
)

measures.name: Count of Customer Accounts Opted In LTD
measures.expression:
VAR MinDate =
    CALCULATE (
        MIN ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Dim Date Sk] = MIN ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] )
    )
VAR MaxDate =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Dim Date Sk] = MAX ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] )
    )
VAR LaunchToDate =
    CALCULATE (
        DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk] ),
        'Customer Loyalty'[Loyalty Opted In Count] = 1,
        FILTER (
            ALL ( 'Date' ),
            'Date'[Calendar Date] >= MinDate
                && 'Date'[Calendar Date] <= MaxDate
        )
    )
VAR IfStatement =
    IF ( LaunchToDate = BLANK (), 0, LaunchToDate )
RETURN
    IfStatement

measures.name: Count of Customer Accounts Opted Out (As Today)
measures.expression:
VAR LatestDate = 
    CALCULATE(
        MAX('Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk]), 
        ALLSELECTED('Customer Loyalty')  
    )

RETURN 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk]),
    'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Status Sk] = "OptedOut",
    'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] = LatestDate, 
    REMOVEFILTERS('Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk]) 
)

measures.name: Count of Customer Accounts Opted Out LTD
measures.expression:
VAR MinDate =
    CALCULATE (
        MIN ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Dim Date Sk] = MIN ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] )
    )
VAR MaxDate =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
        'Date'[Dim Date Sk] = MAX ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Date Sk] )
    )
VAR LaunchToDate =
    CALCULATE (
        DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk] ),
        'Customer Loyalty'[Loyalty Opted Out Count]= 1,
        FILTER (
            ALL ( 'Date' ),
            'Date'[Calendar Date] >= MinDate
                && 'Date'[Calendar Date] <= MaxDate
        )
    )
VAR IfStatement =
    IF ( LaunchToDate = BLANK (), 0, LaunchToDate )
RETURN
    IfStatement

measures.name: Count of Customer Accounts opted In
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk]), 
    'Customer Loyalty'[Loyalty Opted In Count] = 1)

measures.name: Count of Customers Downgraded (As Today)
measures.expression:
VAR LatestWeek =
    MAX ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] )
VAR OptedInCustomers =
    FILTER (
        'Customer Loyalty',
        'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] = LatestWeek
            && 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Status Sk] = "OptedIn"
    )
VAR CustomerByTier =
    DISTINCT (
        SELECTCOLUMNS (
            OptedInCustomers,
            "Customer", 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk],
            "Current Tier Number",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk]
                ),
            "Previous Tier Number",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Sk]
                )
        )
    )
VAR DowngradedCustomers =
    FILTER ( CustomerByTier, [Current Tier Number] < [Previous Tier Number] )
RETURN
    COUNTROWS ( DowngradedCustomers )

                ),
            "Previous Tier Number",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Opt In Sk]
                )
        )
    )
VAR DowngradedCustomers =

RETURN

measures.name: Count of Invites Sent for All Tiers
measures.expression: [Total Requests Sent Tier 1 Count]+[Total Requests Sent Tier 2 Count]+ [Total Requests Sent Tier 3 Count]+[Total Requests Sent Tier 4 Count]

measures.name: Count of Unique Customers Enrolled
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk]), 
    'Customer Loyalty'[Loyalty Opted In Count] = 1)

measures.name: Tier 1 Adoption Rate %
measures.expression:
VAR Numerator =
    CALCULATE(
        DISTINCTCOUNT('Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk]),
        'Customer Loyalty'[Loyalty Opted In Count] = 1,
        'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk] = "GB_LOYT_1"
        
    )
VAR Denominator =
    [Total Requests Sent Tier 1 Count]
RETURN
    DIVIDE(Numerator, Denominator)*100

measures.name: Tier 1 KPI Colour
measures.expression:
SWITCH (
    [Count of Customer Accounts opted In] < [Tier 1 Target Count],
    TRUE (), "#FF385C",
    FALSE (), "#26E066"
)

tables.name: Tier Movement Launch To Date
partitionExpressions:
VAR LatestWeek =
    MAX ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] )
VAR OptedInCustomers =
    FILTER (
        'Customer Loyalty',
        'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] = LatestWeek
            && 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Status Sk] = "OptedIn"
    )
VAR CustomersByPreviousTier =
    DISTINCT (
        SELECTCOLUMNS (
            OptedInCustomers,
            "Customer", 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk],
            "Previous Tier",
                CONCATENATE(
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Opt In Sk]
                ),  " "),
               "Previous Tier Number", 
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Opt In Sk]
                ),
               "Previous Tier Number text",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Opt In Sk]
                ) & UNICHAR(8203)))
                
VAR CustomersByCurrentTier=  DISTINCT (
        SELECTCOLUMNS (
            OptedInCustomers,
            "Customer", 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk],
            "Current Tier",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk]
                ),
                 "Current Tier Number",  LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk]
                ),
                 "Loyalty Tier Country Code",
                    RELATED('Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Country Code])
            
        ))
    

VAR CustomersLaunchToDate =
    ADDCOLUMNS (
        NATURALINNERJOIN ( CustomersByPreviousTier, CustomersByCurrentTier ),
        "Remained", IF ( [Current Tier Number] = [Previous Tier Number], 1, 0 )
    )
RETURN
    CustomersLaunchToDate

tables.name: Tier Movement as of Today
partitionExpressions:
VAR LatestWeek =
    MAX ( 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] )
VAR OptedInCustomers =
    FILTER (
        'Customer Loyalty',
        'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Financial Week Start Date Sk] = LatestWeek
            && 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Status Sk] = "OptedIn"
    )
VAR CustomersByPreviousTier =
    DISTINCT (
        SELECTCOLUMNS (
            OptedInCustomers,
            "Customer", 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk],
            "Previous Tier",
                CONCATENATE(
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Sk]
                ),  " "),
               "Previous Tier Number",  
                 LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Sk]
                ),
               "Previous Tier Number text",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Previous Tier Sk]
                ) & UNICHAR(8203)))
                
VAR CustomersByCurrentTier=  DISTINCT (
        SELECTCOLUMNS (
            OptedInCustomers,
            "Customer", 'Customer Loyalty'[Customer Account Sk],
            "Current Tier",
                LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk]
                ),
                 "Current Tier Number",  LOOKUPVALUE (
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Id],
                    'Customer Loyalty Tier'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk], 'Customer Loyalty'[Dim Customer Loyalty Tier Sk]
                ),
                 "Loyalty Tier Country Code",
                    RELATED('Customer Loyalty Tier'[Loyalty Tier Country Code])
                
        ))
    

VAR CustomersLaunchToDate =
    ADDCOLUMNS (
        NATURALINNERJOIN ( CustomersByPreviousTier, CustomersByCurrentTier ),
        "Remained", IF ( [Current Tier Number] = [Previous Tier Number], 1, 0 )
    )
RETURN
    CustomersLaunchToDate
